markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To diagnose and fix the broken content review process.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Failure:** The content process is stalled by a review bottleneck where Brock rewrites drafts instead of providing actionable feedback. This prevents growthx.ai from learning and publishing at velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Proposed Fix:** A new workflow using Google Docs for reviews will replace GitHub PRs. This enables faster, more direct feedback, which is critical for growthx.ai to improve its content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [**Ownership Shift:** Ashish, Brock's manager, will be tasked with enforcing the new feedback-only review process, as John Jeremiah is the only internal ally for this change.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [**Strategic Reset:** A "reset" meeting with key stakeholders (John, Erik, Ashish, Brock) is planned to align on 2026 content goals and formally implement the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Ineffective Content Review Process

  - [The current process is a bottleneck, with Brock rewriting drafts instead of providing specific feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Impact:**](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**Stalled Publishing:** Only 5 articles are live, far below the target velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**No Learning:** growthx.ai cannot improve its content pipeline without actionable feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Inefficient Editing:** Gabby (growthx.ai editor) wastes time interpreting Brock's changes instead of applying clear directions.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The GitHub PR workflow is ill-suited for the rapid, iterative feedback needed for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

### Solution: New Workflow & Process Metrics

  - [**New Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Drafting:** Initial drafts created in Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Review:** All feedback and revisions occur in the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Approved drafts are converted to GitHub PRs by growthx.ai for final publication.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Process Metric:** Track "revisions per article" to measure quality improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A decreasing average signals that growthx.ai's content pipeline is learning and producing higher-quality drafts from the start.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [**Benchmark:** Erik noted that most clients achieve publication in 1–2 cycles with effective feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

### Context: FleetDM's Sales & Marketing Push

  - [A new VP of Sales is driving a company-wide focus on pipeline and sales efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [The previous "allow people to buy" model is shifting to a proactive, "help people succeed" approach.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [**Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Qualified:** Being implemented to gain website visitor visibility and enable agentic AI engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Muller Digital:** Hired for Google/LinkedIn ads and SEO; will be connected to growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**John Jeremiah:**](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [Align Ashish on the need for a new feedback process.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [Schedule a "reset" meeting with key stakeholders (Ashish, Brock, Erik).](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [Connect growthx.ai with Muller Digital after their onboarding next week.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [**Erik O'Brien:**](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [Prepare an outline for the reset meeting, proposing the new Google Docs workflow and "revisions per article" metric.](https://fathom.video/share/apBzk4FJPNgbRE6apjhHJd7M3P-KGeut?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
